title: A Sinkhole Swallowed an Entire Street Overnight
script: A sinkhole opened up overnight and swallowed a whole section of street. One minute it was a normal road; the next, a crater dozens of feet wide dropped straight down, taking pavement, a parked car, and a chunk of sidewalk with it. Sinkholes form when water quietly hollows out the rock underground for years, until the surface has nothing left to stand on and collapses all at once. There's often no warning at all. Crews had to shut down the whole block and check if nearby buildings were about to go too. So what's actually hiding under the ground beneath your feet?
